Uses of Class
com.irurueta.units.AngleUnit

      Modifier and Type Method Description

      Attempts to determine an angle unit within a measurement string representation.
      static AngleUnit AngleUnit.valueOf​(String name)
      Returns the enum constant of this type with the specified name.
      static AngleUnit[] AngleUnit.values()
      Returns an array containing the constants of this enum type, in the order they are declared.

      Modifier and Type Method Description
      void Angle.add​(double value, AngleUnit unit)
      Adds provided angle value and unit and updates current angle instance.
      static double Angle.add​(double value1, AngleUnit unit1, double value2, AngleUnit unit2, AngleUnit resultUnit)
      Adds two angle values and units and returns the result.

      Adds provided angle value and unit and updates current angle instance.
      static Number Angle.add​(Number value1, AngleUnit unit1, Number value2, AngleUnit unit2, AngleUnit resultUnit)
      Adds two angle values and units and returns the result.
      Angle Angle.addAndReturnNew​(double value, AngleUnit unit, AngleUnit resultUnit)
      Adds provided angle value and unit and returns a new angle instance using provided unit.

      Adds two angles.

      Adds provided angle to current instance and returns a new angle.
      Angle Angle.addAndReturnNew​(Number value, AngleUnit unit, AngleUnit resultUnit)
      Adds provided angle value and unit and returns a new angle instance using provided unit.
      static double AngleConverter.convert​(double input, AngleUnit inputUnit, AngleUnit outputUnit)
      Converts an angle value from input unit to provided output unit.
      static void AngleConverter.convert​(Angle angle, AngleUnit outputUnit)
      Converts and updates an angle to requested output unit.
      static void AngleConverter.convert​(Angle input, AngleUnit outputUnit, Angle result)
      Converts an angle to requested output unit.

      Converts an angle value from input unit to provided output unit.
      static Angle AngleConverter.convertAndReturnNew​(Angle input, AngleUnit outputUnit)
      Converts an angle to requested output unit.
      String AngleFormatter.formatAndConvert​(Number value, AngleUnit unit, UnitSystem system)
      Formats and converts provided angle value and unit using metric system.
      static double AngleConverter.fromDegreesAndMinutes​(int degrees, double minutes, AngleUnit resultUnit)
      Gets angle value from provided integer degrees and decimal minutes.
      static Angle AngleConverter.fromDegreesAndMinutesAndReturnNew​(int degrees, double minutes, AngleUnit resultUnit)
      Gets new angle containing decimal degrees from provided integer degrees and decimal minutes.
      static double AngleConverter.fromDegreesMinutesAndSeconds​(int degrees, int minutes, double seconds, AngleUnit resultUnit)
      Gets decimal degrees from provided integer degrees, integer minutes and decimal seconds.
      static Angle AngleConverter.fromDegreesMinutesAndSecondsAndReturnNew​(int degrees, int minutes, double seconds, AngleUnit resultUnit)
      Gets new angle containing decimal degrees from provided integer degrees, integer minutes and decimal seconds.
      String AngleFormatter.getUnitSymbol​(AngleUnit unit)
      Returns unit string representation.
